reasoning: The HIPAA control 164_308_a_3_ii_c focuses on termination procedures, which in a Kubernetes context can be interpreted as ensuring that access is revoked when a user or service account is no longer needed. This involves managing RBAC roles and bindings to ensure that terminated users or services do not retain access to the cluster. The proposed functions address the revocation of user access, service account access, and cleanup of role bindings upon termination.
title: 164_308_a_3_ii_c: 164.308(a)(3)(ii)(C) Termination procedures
